task_objective: High Fashion Virtual Try-On & Multi-Angle Presentation - Dress Figure 2 outfit onto Figure 1 character with precise identity preservation and 4-angle showcase

character_reference.focus: Facial features, hair, skin tone, body proportions, pose, and identity characteristics - FULL PRESERVATION REQUIRED
character_reference.role: Provide character identity and body structure for virtual try-on

outfit_reference.focus: Clothing cut, fabric texture, pattern, color, accessories, and complete outfit design - FULL PRESERVATION REQUIRED
outfit_reference.role: Provide outfit design to be dressed onto the character

workflow.role: Professional Fashion Photographer & Virtual Try-On Specialist

steps.step_1_character_analysis: Parse character identity from Figure 1 with strict precision: facial features, hair, skin tone, body proportions, and pose.
steps.step_2_outfit_extraction: Extract complete outfit details from Figure 2: clothing cut, fabric textures, patterns, colors, and accessories with NO detail loss.
steps.step_3_virtual_dressing: Precisely dress the outfit from Figure 2 onto the character from Figure 1. The outfit must fit the character's body naturally with seamless edges, no visible artifacts, and physically accurate draping.
steps.step_4_multi_angle_generation: Generate four distinct viewing angles , while maintaining absolute character identity and outfit consistency across all views.

output_requirements: EXACT preservation of character identity from Figure 1 (facial features, hair, skin tone, body proportions)
EXACT preservation of outfit design from Figure 2 (cut, fabric, pattern, color, accessories)
Natural outfit-to-body fit with seamless edges and physically accurate draping
Background source selection (Figure 1 Character background / Figure 2 Outfit background) with seamless integration and with auto-adapted atmosphere and shadows
Outfit design must be 100% consistent across all 4 grids - identical colors, patterns, textures, and details

outputs.grid_1: Front view (0 degrees) - character wearing the outfit from Figure 2, full-body front view clearly revealing overall outfit design and fine details.
outputs.grid_2: 3/4 angle view (45 degrees) - character wearing the outfit, three-quarter front angle showing outfit design from a dynamic perspective with depth and dimension.
outputs.grid_3: Side profile view (90 degrees) - character wearing the outfit, side profile showing outfit design continuity and silhouette from the lateral perspective.
outputs.grid_4: Back view (180 degrees) - character wearing the outfit, back view presenting rear design details including back seams, hemline, and overall rear silhouette.
